zh.Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester於1050年8月19日出生在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯時，他的父親Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches24歲，母親Emma de Conteville15歲。他和Ermentrude de Clermont至少有1個兒子。他去世於1101年7月27日在英國爾馬爾帕斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾切斯特聖 維包也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester was born on 19 August 1050, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France, his father, Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches, was 24 and his mother, Emma de Conteville, was 15. He had at least 1 son with Ermentrude de Clermont. He died on 27 July 1101, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Werburghs Abbey, Chester, Cheshire, E: St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester est né le 19 août 1050, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Emma de Conteville, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Ermentrude de Clermont. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1101, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Werburghs Abbey, Chester, Cheshire, E: St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester am 19. August 1050 in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches 24 und seine Mutter Emma de Conteville 15. Er hatte mit Ermentrude de Clermont mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Juli 1101 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Malpas, Cheshire, England und wurde in St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester è nato il il 19 agosto 1050 nel Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Conteville, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Ermentrude de Clermont. Morì il 27 luglio 1101, nel Malpas, Cheshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.St Werburghs Abbey, Chester, Cheshire, E: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 스트 워버그h'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester(이)가 1050년 8월 19일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Conteville(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Ermentrude de Clermont(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1101년 7월 27일 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 스트 워버그h'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester nasceu em 19 de agosto de 1050, em Avranches, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Conteville, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Ermentrude de Clermont. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1101, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em St Werburgh's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh d'Avranches Earl of Chester родился 19 августа 1050 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard Le Gros Goz Viscount Avranches было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Conteville, 15. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Ermentrude de Clermont. Он умер 27 июля 1101 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ст вирбург'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
